editorial_note: APPROVE. All five source snapshots read and verified; every quote, name, title, number, and date traces to a cited snapshot. The La Manh Hung (VinDynamics Chairman) and Ngo Quoc Hung (VinRobotics CEO) quotes are verbatim with correct speakers and titles. VR-H3 specs (31+ actuators, two edge computers, 6-8 kg payload, VR teleoperation) and the venue dates (ICRA 2026 Vienna Jun 1-5; Computex Taipei Jun 2-5) are confirmed across RoboticsTomorrow, Interesting Engineering, VOV, and TechNode Global. The 'VDM 80-actuator / 11-joint hand' specifics from the bot-blocked Vingroup press release were correctly dropped and appear in none of the cited sources. Sole finding is a soft allowlist gap on otherwise-reputable, cross-corroborated outlets — an infrastructure note, not a content correction.

related_articles.context: Recent Asian humanoid debut, contrasting China's UBTECH with Vietnam's Vingroup entry
